== Notes for [[Item:Q57666|Q57666]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-222881/search/0/Polanco

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-193786/search/0/Polanco

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBEEF551EFBBFA9822EF79916C5823
geni:6000000076572565866

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
